title: VxRail Firmware and Software Update Compliance Posture
app: VxRail LCM inventory API (same family as `vxrail:lcm` patterns)
spl:
index=vxrail sourcetype="vxrail:update" earliest=-24h
| eval comp=lower(compliance_state)
| where comp!="compliant" OR (staged="true" AND installed_release!=target_release)
| stats latest(installed_release) as cur, latest(target_release) as target, latest(comp) as state by cluster_id
description: Non-compliant clusters miss security fixes and risk unsupported combinations during VMware upgrades.
value: Keeps HCI stacks within Dell support matrices and patch SLAs.
implementation: Schedule daily compliance pull. Alert on non-compliant. Integrate with change calendars for staging validation.
visualization: Matrix table clusters vs target; pie compliance; trend over quarters.
grandmaExplanation: We keep an eye on vxRail Firmware and Software Update Compliance Posture and raise the alarm before it drags down real work or real outages start.
knownFalsePositives: IGEL and endpoint UMS health can warn during bulk firmware, certificate rotation, or when a single site loses WAN; use device cohorts to separate local noise from UMS issues.
